script: sleep 5; echo "alejandro-bot: $(systemctl is-active alejandro-bot.service) user=$(systemctl show alejandro-bot.service -p User --value)"; echo "alejandro-responder: $(systemctl is-active alejandro-responder.service) user=$(systemctl show alejandro-responder.service -p User --value)"; echo === recent journal ===; sudo journalctl -u alejandro-bot.service -n 8 --no-pager | tail -8
